name: stackra/notifications-mail
purpose: Mail notification channel — registers the mail driver, renders templates through Blade, injects CAN-SPAM + RFC 8058 headers, and ingests per-provider webhooks.
capabilities: MailSuppression aggregate for hard-bounced / complained addresses
Providers: Mailgun / SendGrid / AWS SES / Postmark / Resend
CAN-SPAM footer + List-Unsubscribe headers on every send
when_to_use: An app sends email through Laravel Mail with per-provider bounce/complaint ingestion and suppression enforcement.
when_not_to_use: For editorial newsletter sends, use stackra/newsletter (which consumes this).
